title: Run RPL security regression gates
description: Preserve external canonical vectors, prior production fixes, and full-path tests; run all requested formatting, focused suites, strict scoped Clippy, and diff checks after child fixes.
acceptance_criteria: cargo fmt runs; lichen-link, lichen-ipv6, lichen-rpl, and lichen-node focused/full tests pass as applicable; strict scoped Clippy and git diff --check pass; no unrelated edits or commit.
